body:
## Rationale

**Same bug class as #1703** (battles LLM sitemap). Issue #1514 created 7 per-comparison LLM markdown files in \`public/llms/gear-comparison/\` — but **never added their sitemap entries**. AI crawlers following \`/sitemap.xml\` cannot discover these files.

## Confirmed gap

\`\`\`bash
ls public/llms/gear-comparison/
# meinl-vs-zildjian.md
# paiste-vs-sabian.md
# sonor-vs-dw.md
# tama-iron-cobra-vs-pearl-demon-drive.md
# tama-slp-vs-pearl-sensitone.md
# tama-vs-pearl.md
# zildjian-vs-sabian.md
\`\`\`

\`\`\`bash
grep "llms/gear-comparison/" api/sitemap.js
# (no output — zero sitemap entries)
\`\`\`

The sitemap only has \`/llms/tools/gear-comparison.md\` (tool page), NOT these 7 per-slug comparison files.

## Fix

**File:** \`api/sitemap.js\`

Add immediately after the \`/llms/gear-comparison.md\` entry (around line 544):

\`\`\`js
// Issue #NNNN: per-comparison brand LLM files — sitemap entries for 7 files shipped in #1514
...gearComparisons.map(c => ({ loc: \`/llms/gear-comparison/\${c.slug}.md\`, priority: '0.5', changefreq: 'monthly' })),
\`\`\`

\`gearComparisons\` is already defined in sitemap.js (line ~154) and contains the 7 slugs.

## Expected impact

- 7 AI-crawlable URLs added to sitemap
- Fills purchase-intent comparison axis in LLM citation surface (tama-vs-pearl, meinl-vs-zildjian, etc.)
- Compound with existing /compare/<slug> pages (gear purchase funnel) + /llms/comparisons.md (top-level)

## Verify

1. \`grep "llms/gear-comparison/" api/sitemap.js | wc -l\` returns 7
2. \`/sitemap.xml\` contains \`/llms/gear-comparison/tama-vs-pearl.md\`
3. GET \`/llms/gear-comparison/tama-vs-pearl.md\` returns 200 (file already exists)
4. No new files needed — sitemap.js change only
5. GSC → Coverage → Valid → new URLs indexed within 1-2 weeks

## Done

When sitemap.js generates 7 \`/llms/gear-comparison/<slug>.md\` entries, one per \`gearComparisons\` entry.
title: SEO: /llms/gear-comparison/ — 7 brand comparison LLM files exist but absent from sitemap (AI crawlers blind)
